visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco warehouse store. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white fuzzy cardigan over a brown dress, stands in front of refrigerated food displays. She holds a large transparent container of "Italian Pasta Salad" and points to the price tag on the label. Other shoppers and carts are visible in the background under bright, industrial lighting. (2) The camera zooms in on the food container as the woman rotates it. Detailed shots show layers of green baby leaves, spiral pasta, thinly sliced pink ham, and white mozzarella cheese balls. The woman uses her fingers to point out specific ingredients through the plastic. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting, likely a dining room. The host is now joined by a second woman wearing a patterned bucket hat. They sit at a wooden table with the opened salad container. The host gestures towards the salad while talking directly to the camera. (4) Frequent close-up insert shots show the texture of the mozzarella balls, the gloss of the olive oil dressing in a small cup, and the roasted appearance of small cherry tomatoes. The women use forks to sample the ingredients, displaying their facial reactions of approval and critique.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 生火腿義麵沙拉. [Slogan]: 最新299元. (2) [Subtitle]: 上面有好多火腿. (3) [Subtitle]: 而且還給的生菜是嫩葉生菜. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後有一些螺旋麵. (5) [Subtitle]: 最重要的是它有一塊一塊的莫札瑞拉起司. (6) [Variety]: 看起來好好吃 299元. (7) [Subtitle]: 回去試試看. (8) [Subtitle]: 而且還是麵又是沙拉感覺很營養. (9) [Subtitle]: 看好不好吃 GO. (10) [Subtitle]: 生火腿義麵沙拉. [Variety]: 好好吃喔. (11) [Subtitle]: 裡面有非常多的羅曼貝比生菜. (12) [Subtitle]: 還有給你一球一球的莫札瑞拉起司. [Variety]: 超好吃. (13) [Subtitle]: 以及炙烤過的小番茄. (14) [Subtitle]: 但我們自己吃完覺得呢. (15) [Subtitle]: 它的螺旋意麵有一點太多了. (16) [Subtitle]: 就是如果沙拉的話應該要以葉菜為主. (17) [Subtitle]: 可是它的那個螺旋麵是它的大部分居民. (18) [Subtitle]: 對然後它的生火腿呢是用澳洲豬肉. (19) [Subtitle]: 我覺得它生火腿很棒哎燻的很香. (20) [Subtitle]: 它的火腿是臺灣人也能接受的火腿. (21) [Subtitle]: 因為我之前有吃過那種歐洲的火腿非常地Chuck. (22) [Subtitle]: 就是有點我沒辦法吃. (23) [Subtitle]: 因為那個味道太重了. (24) [Subtitle]: 然後它的莫札瑞拉起司不會鹹. (25) [Subtitle]: 所以如果你不喜歡吃太重口起司的話這個會很適合你. (26) [Subtitle]: 但它這一款比較殘念的點就是螺旋麵偏多. (27) [Subtitle]: 可是亮點呢就是它的葡萄油醋汁調的超級好. (28) [Subtitle]: 所以如果你非常愛油醋沙拉非常值得試試看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 3 passers-by in the background at Costco.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair in a white cardigan and brown dress; one woman in a black and white patterned bucket hat and a black top with white mesh sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is shot in a Costco warehouse with metal shelves, refrigerated cases, and shoppers. The second half is a domestic indoor setting with a wooden table and a blurred home background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with an energetic female speaker in Traditional Chinese. Her tone is friendly and high-pitched, expressing excitement about the Costco salad. An upbeat, major-key acoustic pop track plays in the background with a clear rhythmic drum beat and piano accents. Faint ambient warehouse noise is present. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition. The speaker continues her rapid description of ingredients. Every time a new ingredient name appears on screen, a 'pop' or 'ding' sound effect is heard, emphasizing the point. The background music remains continuous at a moderate volume. (3) The second female speaker joins, creating a lively conversational mix. Their speech is fast-paced with high emotional arousal. The sound design is crisp, with no significant noise interference. (4) The final segment features a review with a slightly more critical but still positive tone. The BGM maintains its tempo until the very end, where a final 'sparkle' SFX concludes the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear -> Montage -> List-based: Hook -> Evidence/Ingredients -> Taste Test -> Critique -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide an enthusiastic review of a specific food product from Costco. It uses a high-energy delivery style to capture viewer attention, followed by a detailed visual and verbal breakdown of the salad's contents and value for money. The intent is to inform and entertain followers who are interested in grocery recommendations.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While identifying a specific brand (Costco), the content follows a personal review format with both praise and critique, suggesting it is an organic user-generated content vlog rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on text overlays and energetic vocal prosody to maintain a fast 'social-media native' rhythm. The transition from the store to the home serves as a bridge from unboxing to consumption.
